title: Scaling Test-Time Compute to Achieve IOI Gold Medal with Open-Weight Models

results.key_achievement: gpt-oss-120b achieved IOI 2025 gold-level performance using GenCluster
results.scalability: GenCluster improves scores with increased compute and larger generation budgets

contributions: GenCluster: a scalable test-time compute approach for competitive programming
Demonstration that gpt-oss-120b is superior on IOI problems
Validation of GenCluster's scalability with increased compute
